en.extract:
The rufous-crowned prinia (Prinia khasiana) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae.
It is native to Eastern Himalaya.

The '''rufous-crowned prinia''' ('''''Prinia khasiana''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Cisticolidae]].
It is native to [[Eastern Himalaya]].
